narrative:
Alliance 2-B (precinct in Stark County) has 496 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 8.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 20.4%, a clear Democratic lean of 11.9 percentage points.
